pages.text: Eastern lamellar and wanderer mystic. Claimed via $(bold)/cabafaction claim island$(/).$(br2)Unlocks 42 leader-only regalia recipes — Bamboo Hat (kasa), Japanese Light Armor, O-Yoroi, and Raijin ronin armor sets; Thief, Wandering Wizard, Wind Worshipper, Forgotten Trace, and Evening Ghost wanderer sets; and katana-family weapons (Wakizashi, Black Katana, Nagakiba, Marai Executioner Sword), Thief Dagger, Wandering Wizard Sword, Forgotten Trace Spear.
